summary: Implemented Phase 3C. Command-card build/train/research/ability ids are now faction-namespaced with the local player faction, while global tactical/navigation/production-control ids remain un-namespaced. Direct hotkey profiles now store global bindings separately from per-faction `factionBindings`, migrate old flat Kriegsia ids, preserve structurally valid future faction bindings, and the hotkey editor reads/writes the correct binding scope. Updated client UI design docs and marked `plans/faction/phase-3c.md` done.
gameplay_impact: No gameplay stat or balance changes. Kriegsia command cards keep the same visible slots and grid hotkeys, but direct/custom hotkeys for faction-specific actions are now isolated to Kriegsia and will not bleed into future Ekaterina command ids.
next_executor_notes: No commit, merge, push, or final review was performed. Later phases can add Ekaterina command cards under the reserved `ekaterina.*` namespace; existing Kriegsia custom profiles using old `build.*`, `train.*`, `research.*`, or `ability.*` ids migrate on import/load into Kriegsia `factionBindings`.
manual_test_notes: Open hotkey settings, clone/customize a Kriegsia build or train command, export/import the profile, and confirm Kriegsia command-card hotkeys still display and activate normally.
